title: JurassicMine
description: Adds the ability to create a Jurassic Park
body:
The build features excavation mechanics, improved archeology, and many new structures, along with redesigned old ones.
Because the build attempts to replicate Jurassic Park/Jurassic World, dinosaurs don't appear in the world; you have to breed them yourself by obtaining their genome.
The build also features Egyptian mythology, so you'll definitely find something to do. 😉![The assembly includes many decorations and functional blocks for buildings.](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/c92bdfa7071c48a706cc8d553b900b44356d4bd2.jpeg)
